final_prompt.prompt:
Create a UI design system showcase image featuring a web Dashboard, mobile interface, cards, buttons, and controls.

Style/medium: needs a classic minimal tech aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include multi-layer layout showcasing web Dashboard, mobile interface, cards, buttons, and controls arranged with clear visual hierarchy
Subject: must include all UI components:
  Dashboard: web-scale dashboard panel with data visualizations
  Mobile: mobile screen interface
  Cards: UI card components (multiple variants)
  Buttons: button components (multiple states)
  Controls: UI controls / widgets (toggles, sliders, inputs, etc.)
Scene/backdrop: needs a dark tech-environment backdrop — exact surface treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a visually striking, high-tech atmosphere with strong depth and layering — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a cool-toned tech direction with vivid accent highlights — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a glassmorphism or sleek surface treatment — exact sheen and depth is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve all five component categories visible and legible; must convey strong tech-forward visual impact
Avoid: must avoid flat or dull presentation; must avoid cluttered illegible layouts
